speaker: speaker1
text: What's the matter with me , Doctor ? I feel so tired these days .

speaker: speaker2
text: Is your blood pressure , I'm afraid . It's far too high .

speaker: speaker1
text: And what's the cause of that ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Overwork-amongst other things . You can't work 24 hours a day . You ' Ve got to slow down .

speaker: speaker1
text: But I can't just slow down .

speaker: speaker2
text: You've got to , I'm afraid . And look at this . You weigh 200 stones . That's too much for a man of your size .

speaker: speaker1
text: You mean I've got to lose weight ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . You've got to cut down on bread and potatoes and take more exercise .
